reviews.review_description:
Hey Null Void,
This game brought so much happiness to me the first time I played this game. The first time I started playing, I met so much people and mods. They were like friends to me. And I bought the support pack. This game was so fun, being kicked by scary entities, and just playing the game with people running away from monsters. But I took a break and once I came back.. it was  whole new game with no people or anything.. I want you/all of you mods and devs to make the old map again. It was so fun, and that was the reason people don’t play this game anymore. And if any of the devs are seeing this. Tell the owner I said this.

I love the game I have played it for a long time now but there are no people playing which means no admins/anomiles spawn which was my favorite part of the game. I also miss the old map but overall it is a great game.

If the creator sees this please add more anomiles to the game( memory, giant forgotten,etc)
i’ve been playing this game ever since winter and it’s been awesome all i want is if more admins came on like the old days

reviews.review_title: Please bro if you can bring that back
reviews.review_description: This is not the game I found on YouTube because this game on YouTube people are playing it and it's called null void VR and I searched it up on the metaquest and it's saying that this that the game is like when I log on it's like bro. This is not the game like if you're the original developer just change it back please. It would help me a lot but for now I'm going to give it a one star. If you change it I'll give you a five star. So yeah I'm just telling you bye

developer_response.body: I remade the whole game and will not be bringing back the original. I do appreciate your like for the original, but I will not be bringing it back

The Null Void features levels (as im saying this, 7 levels and 1 secret (not finished) level. This game also has a thing called "Anomalys". Mods/Admins/Head admins/ Community managers/ Owner can transform into these things. They have specific rules on the Anomaly tape in shop to survive them! But for the accual game, it is amazing and i 100% reccomend playing! Its so worth it! But one thing. Dont let them get you....

Dude it's me from your game. The back rooms remember me? You gave me access to cool stuff. Thank you again though. Anyways if you want to contact me that's cool. Anyways, I'm giving this a five star although I haven't played it. Some dude said it was really cool so I believe him anyways, keep up the work vector!!! It's me with a bunch of x's and stuff you met me like today 
Goodbye:) no, I'm going to play your game
buckteeth

Although not being a very old game, it has many aspects that make it fun and scary, and it gets updates at a fair pace for only being made by one person with some additional help. Even some larger Gorilla Tag fan games are difficult to compare to this! Definitely deserves more players.
